programme.title: Give Me Shelter - Film
programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: Whales In A Changing Ocean
programme.desc: Wildlife cinematographer Richard Sidey joins an international team of whale research scientists in Antarctica to document their work on how humpback whales adapt to a changing ocean.

programme.title: The Ultimate Ride: Steve Fisher, Kayaking The Zambezi
programme.desc: Dive into The Ultimate Ride as world-renowned kayaker Steve Fisher brings together a crew of big-water pros to experience the full force of Africa’s mighty Zambezi River at record levels. This heartfelt and inspiring documentary captures one of the most legendary figures in adventure sports undertaking the definitive ride of his life.

programme.title: Xplash Ep101
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode we’ll go whitewater kayaking in Canada, BASE Jumping in Idaho, hand-feeding flipping tiger sharks in the Bahamas, and get a close-up view of the adrenalized new sport of canyoning.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep101: Bull Sharks Great Hammerhead Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV takes a Bull Shark diving trip off the Florida Coast, dives with Hammerhead Sharks in the Bahamas and takes a Deeper Dive studying Great Hammerhead Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep101
programme.desc: Liquid Edge kayaks the insane whitewaters of Canada’s Stikine Canyon, flies above a boat with the water powered Jet Lev system, goes behind the scenes of Oakley’s Wave of the Winter featuring World Champion surfer Kelly Slater, and delves deep into a surf barrel via GoPro’s Ride of The Winter.

programme.title: Whales In A Changing Ocean
programme.desc: Wildlife cinematographer Richard Sidey joins an international team of whale research scientists in Antarctica to document their work on how humpback whales adapt to a changing ocean.

programme.title: The Ultimate Ride: Steve Fisher, Kayaking The Zambezi
programme.desc: Dive into The Ultimate Ride as world-renowned kayaker Steve Fisher brings together a crew of big-water pros to experience the full force of Africa’s mighty Zambezi River at record levels. This heartfelt and inspiring documentary captures one of the most legendary figures in adventure sports undertaking the definitive ride of his life.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 01
programme.desc: Jamie Lynn is an introvert. In his snowboarding and art-making, however, he’s big and expressive. Watch Episode 1 of his legendary Microdose series. Featuring Circe Wallace, Mike Hatchett, Sean Sullivan, Temple Cummins, Jason Loeb, Micah Shapiro, Colter Gerber, Apostalos and Demetrius Karabotsos.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 02
programme.desc: In Episode 2 of the Jamie Lynn series, Jamie talks about how the creativity of the artists and skateboarders Mark Gonzales and Neil Blender guides his approach to life as a snowboarder and artist. Featuring Circe Wallace, Matt Cummins, Dano Pendygrasse, Joel Gomez, Scott Sullivan, and Matt Remine.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 03
programme.desc: In Episode 3 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, we talk with a pioneering professional snowboarder and filmmaker, an iconic 90s shredder, and a Tahoe photographer about Jamie Lynn. Join us for tales of guts, gusto, and good jumping genes. Featuring Dave Seoane, Peter Line, and Ruben Sanchez.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 04
programme.desc: In Episode 4 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series we talk with a handful of Jamie’s fellow athletes and industry peers about his loyalties to Sessions, Volcom, Vans, and LibTech among other sponsors. Featuring Joel Gomez, Dave Seoane, Richard Woolcott, Bryan Iguchi, Mike Parillo, and Billy Anderson.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 05
programme.desc: In Episode 5 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Terje Haakonsen shares his insights on Mr. Lynn. From annual meet-ups at Mt. Baker to destinations around the world, Terje takes you there. Featuring Terje Haakonsen, Bryan Iguchi, Richard Woolcott, Ryan Immegart, Mike Parillo, and Troy Eckert.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 06
programme.desc: In Episode 6 of the Jamie Lynn Microdose series, Jamie details the process of filming the iconic Volcom snowboarding movie, ‘The Garden,’ directed by Richard Woolcott. Spoiler Alert: The experience was awesome. Featuring Troy Eckert, Tucker Hall, Billy Anderson, Nicholas Adams, and Mike Parillo.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Jamie Lynn - Dose 07
programme.desc: In Episode 7, we set the snowboarding tales aside to go deep on Jamie Lynn’s passion for art-making. Tune-in to learn how Lynn’s tight-knit crew motivated one another, both on and off the hill, to pursue parallel paths in visual art. Featuring Bryan Iguchi, Schoph, Jamie Heinrich and Pete Saari.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Vivid
programme.desc: Absinthe Films’ Vivid highlights the breakout years of Travis Rice, Romain De Marchi, Nicolas Müller, and Gigi Rüf, delivering some of their most memorable early riding in a fan-favorite classic.

programme.title: Artist Profile - Scott Lenhardt
programme.desc: Artist Scott Lenhardt has kept everything he’s ever made for Burton Snowboards. Everything he’s ever done is stored in his childhood bedroom. After his year-long solo show at the Vermont Ski Snowboard Museum, he organized his archives. Just like his creative process, this film is mind blowing.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 4 - Arville
programme.desc: The FEI Eventing Nations Cup is back with leg 4 in Belgium! Teams reunite in Arville to compete in eventing and become the best nation in the equestrian sport. Last time, France moved to the top in Le Pin au Haras, and competition is proving to be complicated. Are you ready for the challenge?Watch the best moments of the fourth leg in Arville.

programme.title: FEI Eventing Nations Cup - Episode 5 - Boekelo
programme.desc: Boekelo, in The Netherlands, is the last stop of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021. Team Sweden wants to repeat their victory from 2019 and as defending champions they will deliver a top sport performance. However, Great Britain is on the lead of this leg with 80.8 points thanks to the stellar performance of Fox-Pitt and Nicola Wilson. Will this be enough to earn the title? Find out now in the final leg of the FEI Eventing Nations Cup 2021.

programme.title: Jumping International La Baule - Derby
programme.desc: The Derby at La Baule is an awaited event amongst horse enthusiasts. Classified as a CSIO 5*, competitors rush against the clock for a prize money of 40,000 euros. They will have to beat all sort of obstacles with a height of 1.45m across the field. The competition is hard and not all combinations are ready to challenge the fences, water and ramps in the way.Watch the best moments of the 2019 competition.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Week 4
programme.desc: A surprising amount of horses have made an appearance in the fourth week of the CSI3* of the Sunshine Tour. As 153 horses jumped in the 1.50m, Big Tour D class, it had to be divided in two sections. All the other sections of the competition had incredible outcomes as Dutch rider Kim Emmen continues to dominate the 6yr old section. Are you ready for the best showjumping action of the Sunshine Tour 2020? Let's rewind on the fourth week of the competition!

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin Vanquish is timeless and carries the strongest engine of the British brand under its hood. Also: Arden gave a Jaguar a power treatment and transformed the F-Type R to their Arden AJ23. And: the Morgan AR P4 roadster.

programme.title: 4x4

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Postcards from Paros
programme.desc: Welcome to Paros, one of the islands in the Aegean Sea nestled between the Cyclades. Word spreads fast that Paros is one of the trendiest and most diverse islands in Greece, so we will be discovering more about this island’s history, culture and nautical destinations.Discover Paros flavours and visit the environmental and cultural part of Pars, protected for its indigenous fauna and flora, its positions in history and, of course, its marvellous beaches. Send Postcards from Paros, a pearl in the Aegean Sea worth discovering.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: The Crikvenica Riviera is one of the most scenic parts of the Adriatic coast with a rich diversity of attractive beaches, green hinterland, a continental wooden area, a climate that provides perfect refreshment in the summer time and just the right amount of action-packed fun in the sun. Find out more in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: Welcome, sailors! In this episode of Sail-ho Croatia we arrive to the incredibly beautiful, fragrant and action-packed island of Cres. The islands of Cres and Lošinj are connected to the ancient legend of Jason and the Argonauts in their search for the golden fleece aboard the Argo. Stick around to find out the best spots in these islands!

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 3
programme.desc: Lapo and his Captain are sailing to Pianosa, a very remote and exclusive Island. As it is a prison island, boats cannot come within a mile radius. This means Lapo is on a solo mission. Lapo will meet the prisoners who are keeping the island pristine but taking care of it’s natural fauna and flora. He will cook with ingredients from the prison garden and learn a secret dish from one of the wardens. Will this impress the Captain?

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 4
programme.desc: Lapo arrives on Giglio Island where he meets a local fisherman who supplies the restaurants with their seafood. On their trip out to sea, Lapo learns about species of the area and how to fish sustainably. He finds his catch when a bunch of girls who come from America come to dine on board. Now, its the right time to remember everything he learnt from the Maestros.

programme.desc: Jakob Kelser is a man with a horrific, troubled past. Having been failed by society and plagued by a gruesome childhood memory, he is forced to live alone in the unholy hell of God's making.

programme.title: Pillow Party Massacre
programme.desc: Haunted by a prank gone fatally wrong, five friends reunite to heal. But not all can forget, and it's clear that someone or something is out for revenge.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E04 - Elizabeth At 80 Continuity And Change
programme.desc: Thanks to the Queen’s dedication, Britain found a way to move past its empire days and create a successful new identity, surprising many experts. This is the story of an amazing woman and her amazing life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E45 - Charles A Portrait A Man Alone
programme.desc: This tells the tale of a man juggling the stress of his public obligations with the challenges of a failing marriage that's playing out in front of the world. It's a special look at the man fated to become King.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E40 - A Century Of The Queen Mother 100 Years In 100 Minutes
programme.desc: This documentary dives into the love lives of Britain's royal family during the 20th century, looking at the history of royal weddings and wondering what lies ahead for a royal family constantly under media scrutiny and whose affairs are public knowledge.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E08 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: It's payday for wilderness guide Charlie Summerville as the first guests of the season roll in, getting treated to an incredible whale-watching show. Meanwhile, over on Umnak Island, Pat and Connie Harvie are saying their last goodbyes to America's most remote ranch.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E05 - First Day of Deer Season
programme.desc: Michigan hunters harvested the second most whitetails in the country. Keeping track of everyone in the field requires near 24/7 surveillance.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E06 - Illegal Blinds
programme.desc: Hunting blinds can not be left on state land year-round. When officers find blinds that need to be removed, they search high and low for the owners.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E04 - Naturally Exotic
programme.desc: This Episode of Miracles of Nature takes you on a journey from the Antigua in the Caribbean to the favourite of climbers - the Blue Mountains of New South Wales, Australia and then back to the Caribbean to admore in the beauty of The British Virgin Islands with stunning white beaches and turquoise waters.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E05 - Naturally Fierce
programme.desc: Visit the wintry North Pole from the comfort of your settee as this episode takes us on a journey to the icy Artic and then to Quebec to watch the most southernly fjord set at low tide, before journeying on to Alberta to take in the magnitude of the Sasquachuan River as it makes its way through the Rocky Mountains.

programme.desc: An incredulous Nicolás tries to understand how Victoria could lash out violently against Florencia knowing she was pregnant, as Florencia now mourns the loss of her son. On a new day, Nicolás confronts Victoria, whom he reproaches for having caused the death of his son by hitting Florencia; even though Victoria tries to convince him that everything is an invention of his wife; Nicolás is sure of Guanipa's guilt. Certain that all the evidence can incriminate Sergio of Genara's death, Fernanda insists on threatening to accuse him to the police if he does not help her to take the Cantarrana hacienda from the Guanipa family, even if he has to betray Victoria; Sergio has no other way out but to accept Fernanda's offer. Once Florencia takes refuge in Fernanda, fearful that Nicolás will discover that she is the one lying about the loss of her son; Eugenia has listened to her mother, who assures her that she will go to her father's side as soon as he finds a place to live.

Willing to clear up the mystery of Genara's death, Federico offers his help to Sergio to punish the real culprit of the murder, even if it is his own mother (Fernanda). At nightfall, Florencia -semi-naked- lies down next to an inebriated Nicolás to make him believe that they have slept together, because the young Zapata only needs a son to regain Nicolás' love. The next day, Nicolás regrets having used Florencia; the man cannot offer her love, so it would be a mistake to conceive another child; even though the pain of losing their first child unites them, Nicolás decides to separate from her. Alone, Florencia communicates with Hilario to summon him to the lands of Cantarrana; Florencia intends to get pregnant in order to keep her husband by her side.

programme.title: ALEGRATE
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fuerte tensión cuando Max encuentra a Camila en la mansión López Méndez. Fausto y Patricia, duros y crueles, agreden a Julia, pero saben que el peor castigo vendrá de manos de su propio padre, Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel pretende que Camila le entregue el cuaderno para conocer bien los detalles de la venganza. Luego, la sorprende al pedirle que se case con él a cambio de ayudarla pues si no hay boda, no hay trato ni sociedad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila y Max se ofenden con ironías y frases hirientes. Las cuatro mujeres involucradas en la traición vuelven a reunirse para aliarse y anular a Camila, pero la Madre Isabel se impone. Tanto el Padre Tiziano como Luciano advierten sobre el peligro del matrimonio entre Camila y Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Cuernavaca
programme.desc: El mundo de Andy cambia totalmente cuando su madre tiene un accidente. Sin nadie que lo cuide, es llevado a Cuernavaca, a la casa de su desconocida abuela paterna. Mientras su madre se debate entre la vida y la muerte, el niño se enfrentará a la frialdad de su abuela, al mundo seductor y peligroso del hijo del jardinero y a la búsqueda de su padre

programme.title: El Sonido de los Tulipanes
programme.desc: En Buenos Aires durante la crisis del 2001, Marcelo un escritor devenido en periodista, debe volver sobre los últimos pasos de su padre Tonio un consagrado intelectual de quien se encuentra profundamente distanciado cuando muere en condiciones extrañas. De la mano de Carolina la ex secretaria de su padre, Marcelo se sumerge en un mundo oscuro lleno de violencia y ambiciones de poder enfrentándose a “El Loco” Bertolini. Pero el peligro no solo lo acechará a él sino también a los suyos. ¿Podrá Marcelo encontrar los verdaderos motivos de la muerte de su padre?

programme.title: El Desertor
programme.desc: Luego de ser reclutado para el servicio militar y ante los abusos de su jefe inmediato, el Subteniente Montilla, Julián escapa del cuartel, lo que provoca una feroz persecución por parte de Montilla, quien se ha enamorado de Sagrario y hará todo lo posible para separar a los jóvenes.

programme.title: El Tercer Deseo
programme.desc: Eugenio, un corredor de bienes raíces despierta en una esquina de la ciudad con una descomunal borrachera y descubre cerca una desportillada tetera de metal. La toma y manosea a ver si es de plata y, de pronto, se le aparece el espectro de un duende que le sugiere formule tres deseos. El genio desaparece sin dar oportunidad al tercer deseo. Mas tarde, descubre que los deseos le han sido concedidos pero de forma equivocada. La vida de Eugenio se complica, solo anhela reencontrar la tetera abandonada y pedir el tercer deseo.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
